channel.title: SPL - Douglass-Truth Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Douglass-Truth Branch

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Office Hours with Department of Neighborhoods
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch

The City of Seattle’s Department of Neighborhoods will be holding office hours as part of their ‘Meeting Community Where They Are At’ Initiative.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details
